entries.material: A AIR CONDITIONING AND MECHANINCAL VENTILATION (ACMV) SYSTEM Insulation Sheet for Supply, Return, Fresh Air & Toilet Exhaust Air Duct (For Toilet Area have AC) Supply, installation, testing and commissioning of Insulation Sheet for Supply, Return, Fresh Air & Toilet Exhaust Air Duct (For Toilet Area have AC) as drawing and specification. Thermal insulation shall be of rigid fiberglass of 48kg/m3 with thermal conductivity of not greater than 0.038 W/mK at 20oC mean temperature. Fiberglass Insulation, 25mm thickness
